description: On the Beach is a UK holiday booking service for searching and booking package holidays, flights, and hotels. Its public website is consumer-facing; the only developer/agent integration surface verified here is an MCP endpoint.
summary: On the Beach exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.onthebeach.co.uk/chatgpt/v2`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI integration surfaces were found on `onthebeach.co.uk`.
